name: simple-model-project-intelligence
description: Codex plugin for deterministic simple_model Project Intelligence workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Take over and optimize large repos with deterministic macros.
interface.longDescription: Adds deterministic Project Intelligence for large in-progress repositories: takeover initialization, multi-file struct.json models, structural interface parsing, stability commitments, semantic and dynamic-edge governance, transactional macro optimization, affected-test selection, rollback proofs, dashboards, and release gates. AI is limited to bounded leaf clarifications while macros own structural decisions.
defaultPrompt: Take over this half-built repository and issue interface stability commitments.
Find safe structural optimizations and prove them with transactional macros.
Run Project Intelligence gates for my current changes.
Help adopt this large repo into struct.json.
